title: Feedback item update makes exactly one mutation call and returns updated record

comments.author: derek
comments.text:
Feature: Feedback item update and feedback search consistency

Scenario: Updating feedback item returns the updated record without extra reads
Given a feedback item id and update input
When the update operation is executed
Then exactly one update mutation is sent
And the returned feedback item reflects updated fields

Scenario: Feedback search includes items near time-window boundary
Given feedback edited near the lower bound of the query window
When feedback items are queried with the configured buffer
Then matching items are not missed at the boundary

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Completed via PR #199 (merged to develop). Updated tests to align with current feedback update behavior and time-window/invalid-item filtering expectations.
